sources.title: 1954 - The Good Die Young - Los buenos mueren jóvenes - Lewis Gilbert - VOSE
The Good Die Young ( 1954, UK) Richard Basehart, Joan Collins, Gloria Grahame, John Ireland - Film Noir Full Movie
sources.description: The Good Die Young is a 1954 British film noir crime thriller film made by Remus Films. It was directed by Lewis Gilbert. The screenplay was based on the book of the same name written by Richard Macaulay.The cast includes Richard Basehart, Joan Collins, Gloria Grahame John Ireland, Laurence Harvey,, Sir Stanley Baker, Margaret Leighton CBE, Robert Adolph Wilton Morley CBE and Rene Ray, Countess of Midleton! Wikipedia: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Good_Die_Young Suggested British Film Noirs: http://bit.ly/3aMND3W The Internet Archive is an excellent choice for entire full length Netflix & YouTube style uploads of drama, mystery, thriller & crime noir movies from the UK & USA for free. Download complete online British & American classic black & white films from the 1940s & 1950s.

metadata.Plot: Three good men - a broken boxer, an American veteran trying to win back his mother-dominated wife, and an Air Force Sergeant married to a faithless actress - are corrupted by Miles "Rave" Ravenscourt (Laurence Harvey), an amoral "gentleman". Because they need money, they let Miles lure them into his scheme to rob a postal van with a large cash cargo.
metadata.Writer: Vernon Harris, Lewis Gilbert, Richard Macaulay
metadata.Actors: Laurence Harvey, Gloria Grahame, Richard Basehart
